# terrible_dellemc_openmanage_ome_identity_pool (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `pool_name` (String) This option is mandatory for *state* when creating, modifying and deleting an identity pool.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `ethernet_settings` (String) Applicable for creating and modifying an identity pool using Ethernet settings. *starting_mac_address* and *identity_count* are required to create an identity pool.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fc_settings` (String) Applicable for creating and modifying an identity pool using fibre channel(FC) settings. This option allows OpenManage Enterprise to generate a Worldwide port name (WWPN) and Worldwide node name (WWNN) address. The value 0x2001 is beginning to the starting address for the generation of a WWPN, and 0x2000 for a WWNN. *starting_address* and *identity_count* are required to create an identity pool.
- `fcoe_settings` (String) Applicable for creating and modifying an identity pool using FCoE settings. *starting_mac_address* and *identity_count* are required to create an identity pool.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `iscsi_settings` (String) Applicable for creating and modifying an identity pool using ISCSI settings. *starting_mac_address*, *identity_count*, *iqn_prefix*, *ip_range* and *subnet_mask* are required to create an identity pool.
- `new_pool_name` (String) After creating an identity pool, *pool_name* can be changed to *new_pool_name*. This option is ignored when creating an identity pool.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `pool_description` (String) Description of the identity pool.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) `present` modifies an existing identity pool. If the provided I (pool_name) does not exist, it creates an identity pool. - `absent` deletes an existing identity pool.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `error_info` (String) Details of the HTTP Error.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `msg` (String) Overall status of the identity pool operation.
- `pool_status` (String) Details of the user operation, when *state* is `present`.
